query: I need assistance in crafting a travel plan starting in Fort Lauderdale and covering 3 cities in Georgia. The trip, designed for 2 people, will span from March 24th to March 30th, 2022. Our budget is $8,000. Regarding accommodations, we require rooms that are not shared and should accommodate children under 10. As for dining options, we have diverse tastes, including Indian, American, Chinese, and Mediterranean cuisines.

plan.transportation: Flight F3510231, Fort Lauderdale to Atlanta
plan.attraction: Atlanta Botanical Garden; World of Coca-Cola; Georgia Aquarium;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Garden Oasis Brooklyn Private 1 Bedroom Apt, Decatur

plan.attraction: Martin Luther King, Jr. National Historical Park; Piedmont Park; High Museum of Art;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Garden Oasis Brooklyn Private 1 Bedroom Apt, Decatur

plan.attraction: DeKalb History Center Museum; Glenlake Park; Waffle House Museum;

plan.attraction: Medlock Park; Oakhurst Dog Park; Decatur Square;

plan.attraction: Phinizy Swamp Nature Park; Augusta Riverwalk; Augusta Museum of History;
